title: Charred Tunisian Tagine Stew
description: A flavorful and comforting stew from North Africa, made with charred vegetables and served with warm pita bread.

ingredients.name: Charred Eggplant
ingredients.notes: Brush with olive oil and grill until charred.

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the charred eggplant, Tunisian olives, canned tomatoes, lemon juice, and 1 cup of water.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bring the stew to a simmer and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs and accompanied by warm pita bread.
Optional: Serve with a side of couscous or roasted vegetables.
